name: Charter Hall Group
analysis: CHC's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 8% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$23.6200, stop A$20.9187, target A$31.7239 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
